name: cody-master
description: Universal AI agent skills framework: TDD, debugging, deployment, design, i18n, content — 30+ skills in 5 domains. One install = senior engineer discipline for your coding agent.

plugins.name: cm-engineering
plugins.description: Engineering discipline skills: TDD, debugging, quality gates, test infrastructure, and code review — enforce Red-Green-Refactor and 6-gate verification.

plugins.name: cm-operations
plugins.description: Operations and deployment skills: multi-gate deploy pipeline, identity guard, git worktrees, terminal safety, secret scanning, and i18n extraction.

plugins.name: cm-product
plugins.description: Product design and planning skills: brainstorming, UX/UI design, project bootstrap, documentation generation, and audio reading mode.

plugins.name: cm-growth
plugins.description: Growth and marketing skills: AI content factory, ad tracking setup (Facebook/TikTok/Google), and CRO methodology.

plugins.name: cm-orchestration
plugins.description: Orchestration and meta skills: execution modes, working memory, skill chaining, progressive skill index, and skill mastery.
